view.title: View Web Weaving {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to resend the welcoming stone?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcoming stone hath been resent. Check thy inbox.

buyIp.title: Conjure Additional Ether Address Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Gold ({symbol}) every moon cycle as thy web weaving is tithed
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional Ether Address gold: {symbol}{cost}/moon cycle. Art thou certain thou wishest to conjure an additional ether address?

migration.title: Transport Thy Web Weaving
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Mage Name / Ethereal Address / Arcane ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the site is live/busy with high arcane traffic, may we set a holding sanctum during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Doth this site have special requirements such as PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Dost thou also wish us to aid thee in transferring the territory name registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Dost thou wish us to transmute the name-binders as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this parchment shall open a new magical parchment for our arcane council to begin thy migration.
migration.note2: Prithee be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to transport is vast.
migration.note4: The old web weaving grimoire needs to be online and accessible whilst we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Prithee make no alterations on thy site whilst we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be transported to the new web weaving.
